name: yetidevworks/yetisql
description: A pure-PHP, SQLite-compatible embedded SQL database. Zero extensions, single committable file, PDO-shaped API.

suggest.illuminate/database: Use the Eloquent/Laravel adapter (YetiDevWorks\YetiSQL\Eloquent) to back Eloquent with YetiSQL (^11.0 || ^12.0 || ^13.0)
suggest.doctrine/dbal: Use the Doctrine DBAL driver (YetiDevWorks\YetiSQL\Doctrine) to back Doctrine with YetiSQL (^4.4)
